name: Dorothy McAuliffe
subject: Let’s end 2020 on a high note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOUDIV25YIwtVC_K7hOFT8x-nbaVPNvBgzvJwv08IIITGWU4rSuewSbXKFJaZxFXfeEhfIH1yC7l_sXGW3LzqWwQt7ReySnm_xxOSZpGWmyz1uxl8T0fYQxAY1hNqrPIiNlQofSUf3buRNblaZ9ea25AVTBhZnJxX04f4uy_fnfTcFzzKlpcM6zqEvwtzPFOR8dd0pfVOLc2084MBkrAoV22x4OwjHra5d5woSoB2xW9eZqsuEs3_gJNMN9_Q0QjkAyC4P2JC8Gu0lkJWbiXZPTW7MRNuI27Mo1mog3Lgm4ws/386/rwlpFwFUQZqFvZK6MbH6Xg/h0/4tl8hy7dazh7tUsc1BonUWt61r5uz71xVYPVKjAGIKo)
Derek, For the past three weeks, we’ve been in an all-out sprint to raise the early funds necessary to build a winning campaign and take Terry’s bold message for Virginia’s future to every corner of the Commonwealth. Now, with less than 48 hours before the end-of-year filing deadline, we’re still well-short of our $25,000 fundraising goal. Whether or not we can close the gap in the final hours will say a lot about the strength of this team. Derek, it’s a huge test and I’m asking for your support. **[Please contribute $23 or anything you can afford before tomorrow’s filing deadline. Let’s send the message that we’re ready to hit the ground running in 2021.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOUDIV25YIwtVC_K7hOFT8x86XIw2j8xKTx-gEl8IN4p4nqjQVAYRw-aQeOm_iSNYbG0fVkPmatQBOCsSP5Ne4EZI___CqaRT6JGHKu-lr3jdW7tpSPbGFdm3CII7N1TQX44kfUHOMZoDfoXK1GNzy11mpZiXkCFYhc-izcUbnf2ABtOSKrqS07sH3d5uBfhrND6jZYEXvQ2-NB8yZzC8hdxIqM6BPBf1sviaiowtK0FjBsxZmf_4yZm2_WO48btPo_gqntMm1UWCTWl_6LvERTbFyeu1rtdC5yPVywEBGEO6/386/rwlpFwFUQZqFvZK6MbH6Xg/h1/YR5kwoOguaSo9FzRB32h_NunA_XkBV-OBf1UPiqKDRw) ** In 2020, Virginia Democrats stood together and sent the message that Donald Trump’s politics of hate have no home in Virginia. Believe it or not, there’s even more on the line next year. According to University of Virginia political guru Larry Sabato, the Virginia GOP has a real shot of winning statewide. If we don’t stand united, a Trump-supporting, conspiracy theorist like Amanda Chase could become our next Governor. So this isn’t just another deadline. It’s a golden opportunity to end 2020 on a high note and show Virginia Republicans that Democrats are united to stop them in the new year. **[Can we count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can to help us reach our end-of-year deadline? Every little bit counts and Terry could sure use your support.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOUDIV25YIwtVC_K7hOFT8x8wbBrmYv1EuhzdwaHZ94xB9QTZt9cYJS71j8ZItmUbrGqT91DtXAN-vP2bRFMRl_DUhsZkVV2PlVLurTwWd9J_2fCy-o9S6QcaLwOxkc4nVQMOz8AdDfJ7zfCJrTzThCkT8LcoG4Gv6sacLpku2nd8cXlq7cVUgakZy5XV2eKchk2evvZ4qJJQAdkEGaHwyFghNee6JvmPJmy3styetKxdNZ0Abx1OrM_MxcyI7uJy_8gJa9EiEWEbqEjkIdaQ9kK-FdOLguikJdIAso8Racjw/386/rwlpFwFUQZqFvZK6MbH6Xg/h2/u848uFMao9Ggd687rfMJXedLfEAkp_irjZwIw0WgQsk)** Thanks, Dorothy
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOUDIV25YIwtVC_K7hOFT8x_4IiwzS9y39ZjHZhkaO5VmFqIEWsNXrilZ1ATRWVx9L_02Fl5ImHGTnl27whxFdYqTG9cx95FuBcn-Cm9HYFj7P2YhA_391Pj9hDoyLLI_dXHfC5QCXgNYZca4BAMmbUXby9E-coFU7XHhaaP5C6Pl2Fq7HZTEtzkBQ5CdpBzIMSOpvpjAVKN-yMo6r6OoVY9i6TiV_xCBeRhPaunM02ZGYPVL14vUPOSLF6nSG9neI4yXV6bhfpRPmVVL9TcvwHGdsGhw4VQkxAtvqwjSKQIB/386/rwlpFwFUQZqFvZK6MbH6Xg/h3/CwxblXfsPKYvA5gaRy-Tn09p7z2-vLHeJz09kfoPdGE)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20Georgia?=
subject: #SURVIVALCHECKS
body:
The House has already passed the bill to get this done. Mitch McConnell is standing in the way. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/momsinoffice/survivalchecks?e=3f151f8b74)
---
# Bring it to the floor, Mitch..
[](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a51f5beefe&e=3f151f8b74)
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8384a33199&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Dear Friend—American families across the country need relief now. The House has passed a bill with bipartisan support to get it done and get money in the pockets of hard working people. Mitch McConnell is standing in the way ignoring the needs of millions who are struggling to put food on the table, pay rent and take care of the basic needs of their families. **This is why I need your help.** There are a few things we can all do today to let our government know that we demand $2,000 emergency relief for working people. Call your senators. Demand the Senate VOTE now on the bipartisan direct payment legislation passed by the House of Representatives. ****[U.S. Senate: Senators of the 116th Congress](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b39c0fed92&e=3f151f8b74)Support grassroots organizations who are working hard to get Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock elected. Everything that we have worked for to advance a bold progressive agenda will come down to what happens in Georgia.If we win in Georgia, we can take back the Senate from GOP control and end Mitch McConnell’s obstructionism by removing him as majority leader. It all comes down to the next 6 days and we simply can’t afford to come up short this time. **As a single mom who is dedicated to get more women elected, I am supporting Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock because we need allies in Congress who will join us in this fight.** We need their leadership to advance a bold progressive agenda for working mothers such as paid leave, a higher minimum wage and universal preschool. We need to win big in Georgia to make sure we have a Senate that works for people like you and me, hard working Americans fighting for our families and our children’s future. Can I count on you to support [Moms for Georgia](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a1e145eefa&e=3f151f8b74) so that we can get to work in January to save the heart and soul of America? Sincerely, Simona GraceFounder, Moms in Office
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=45b5afb835&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | | | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=50dd20d445&e=3f151f8b74)| [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=008bde95de&e=3f151f8b74)| [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8e9f2e42e7&e=3f151f8b74)
---|---|---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Predictions for 2021
body:
It’s that time of year again!
It's that time of year again! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [My Predictions for 2021](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-j/)
Want to know what's going to happen over the next year? Read it here first! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Finally a Deal, and Merry Christmas](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-d/)
With only two days to go until Christmas, you're busy. So was Congress, passing a $900 billion COVID relief package. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Georgia Runoff](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-u/)
The upcoming Georgia Senate runoffs are perhaps the most important races in recent memory. They will decide what kind of country we are for years to come. I talk about why that is in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Let's Not Repeat Obama's Mistake in Iraq](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-n/)
A further reduction of US troops in Iraq was recently announced. Is this a wise move? I think not, and here's why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhklkid-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: Loeffler, Perdue Statement On More Than 8,000 Georgians Volunteering To Poll Watch On Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2020
Loeffler, Perdue Statement On More Than 8,000 Georgians Volunteering To Poll Watch On Election Day Poll Watchers Will Ensure The Election Is Safe, Secure, And That Every Legal Vote Counts ATLANTA, GA - In a historic effort to ensure the upcoming elections are safe and secure, Georgia Republicans have recruited more than 8,000 Georgians to serve as poll watchers for the January 5 runoff elections. Georgia Republicans are running the largest and most aggressive ballot security and voter integrity operation in state history. Senators Loeffler and Perdue released the following statement on this historic operation:
"Georgians deserve total confidence in the fairness and accuracy of our state's elections, and we're thankful to the thousands of volunteers who will ensure that these runoffs are safe, secure, and that every legal vote is counted. Georgia Republicans have already mobilized the most robust ground game and poll watching operation in the state's history and are fully prepared to make certain that the integrity of next week's elections will not be cast under a shadow of doubt. Everything is on the line on Election Day - no Georgian should have to question the outcomes." Georgia Republicans made history during the early vote period, as more than [4,000 volunteers](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EjPNlHFSuLJnPwuqUVNRqtip2xMnF1DFRsm_aP-3Av2No-KyjKVuy69ydfbj6lSVj6nqoqL8FRPDETlbeDeJX-DVgQsMnClJfCR2AE66NepTeGBnuLyVnnmM5qKW6zLEDTpgirTMULxunRsQmOaA1sO7fC0V1fwZBCl8siYPzyC6tttcCUd3kXLtGZHcu7FDq8SPpWMrgJ64RrORDov_uw==&c=v5m9SpyhMJqYWaO2I8NNQZYR58ZTuvjt4KvxCQD9ZRJHnnodU-2NSg==&ch=4JdTqm8sX-OryaX9u18LmtnDjfanxku8mKTVu26RfgrtxF4KxXDsrw==) served as poll watchers at early vote locations - the largest early vote ballot security operation in Georgia history.
---

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99aa0840af5dde8cf3d63f5b5d61d9106dc4197b6047b4eeb7513a7d73365bd7b76ecd8d839b32ab464892456ab22ab8a7f111a3c0d57383

Friend,

I emailed you.

My son Don emailed you.

The Trump Finance Team emailed you.

name: Team Hern
subject: The left’s destructive plans for 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The left has damaging plans for Oklahoma and all America in 2021. Will you help stop them? >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/e4883b2061c9f07dc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, The GOP saw some great wins in the House during the 2020 elections, but unfortunately, the Dems kept a narrow grip on their majority. That means Nancy Pelosi will be in the Speaker’s Office for the next two years, pushing her radical agenda on America. Nancy Pelosi is the most unpopular person in America because she’s let radical socialists take over her party. They’re going to push the most dangerous progressive agenda our country has ever seen, so we have to fight harder than ever to preserve American ideals. AOC wants to enact the Green New Deal. Ayanna Pressley is determined to defund the police. Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar want to forgive all college loans. They ALL want to raise taxes — an action that will absolutely cripple small businesses and families across the nation. Last, but certainly not least, they want to destroy the [**opportunities for everyone to be able to reach and achieve the American dream**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/dcb688bb6ae0dfdec3d6b838967d376c/34143). _We have to fight back, for Oklahoma, and all of America._ **Kevin asked us to write to you and tell you how critical it is that every patriot give their financial support for this fight. He knows times are tight this time of year, but if everyone can chip in even just $5 or $10, it will make a huge difference!** [**CHIP IN $10 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/6d0064de606ba43bc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/dd717ccc13443766c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/7a7f539d773d493cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Please help us make a strong statement by donating before our last fundraising deadline of the year at midnight on December 31st.
We will not be bullied by Pelosi and her Socialist Squad. We will stand firm in what’s right, and protect the rights of every citizen to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thanks for your help, Team Hern [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ca12c50cf842ed3f/792c497f7f4b8c9fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:47:05:665t Paid For By Hern For Congress

Friend,

With 2021 just hours away, I want to take this time to wish you a very **Happy New Year** on behalf of my family and all of us on the LaHood team!

**I can’t thank you enough for all the ways you showed your support in 2020.**

Your involvement helped us make some incredible progress towards our goals –– and we’re looking forward to building on that success together in the coming months as we press forward in the fight for a better and brighter future for Illinoisans.

**I couldn’t do this without you on our team, and that’s why I want to hear from you one last time before we ring in the new year. **

clean_body: I want to hear from you one last time before we ring in the new year Thank You for Your Support in 2020! | | | Friend, With 2021 just hours away, I want to take this time to wish you a very Happy New Year on behalf of my family and all of us on the LaHood team! I can’t thank you enough for all the ways you showed your support in 2020. Your involvement helped us make some incredible progress towards our goals –– and we’re looking forward to building on that success together in the coming months as we press forward in the fight for a better and brighter future for Illinoisans. I couldn’t do this without you on our team, and that’s why I want to hear from you one last time before we ring in the new year. Once again, Happy New Year! Darin LaHood | | ---|--- | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Stanton
subject: Help us hit our fundraising goal before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Tonight at midnight our last fundraising goal of 2020. We've had a strong year, but we cannot afford to come up short this time. [**Can you chip in $5, $25, $50, or $100 to help Greg before midnight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QDiCuTbwbHDCP2rYLrSAR9fZZAhciLh_q-n7Fy4yno=/OT84D8poe8st5VzZBrl9uA_hq2tZdQNecqu9gEmdnUs=?refcode=X_121420_EOQ_D)

This year has been marked by Americans from all walks of life across the country coming together to help each other, bound by common goals and beliefs. We're asking one more time this year for you to chip in to Team Stanton.

**[Can you rush a $5, $25, $50, or $100 contribution today to make sure Greg and other Democrats can keep fighting in 2021?](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QDiCuTbwbHDCP2rYLrSAR9fZZAhciLh_q-n7Fy4yno=/OT84D8poe8st5VzZBrl9uA_hq2tZdQNecqu9gEmdnUs=?refcode=X_121420_EOQ_D)**

name: Team Kelly
subject: Help Kelly Across the Finish Line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Kelly is FIRED UP for a big victory on Tuesday - following several jam-packed weeks fighting for Georgians and working around the clock to get out the vote!
Millions of Georgians have already voted, and you may be among them. But if you haven't voted yet, now's the time!
TODAY is the last day of early voting. If you're able to today, please vote. If not, please find your polling location and make a plan to vote on January 5th -- and remind all of your family, friends, neighbors, and co-workers to do the same!
Kelly has recorded a special video message about the importance of going to vote. [WATCH it here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8FqDm_8cZLl5sWAE9P1ZNNQe5HtzqGD7pSggjfNwlYETHBdYOhtBnYqZYAso_vHGS5tFsnLO_cD01Pw0qsQYffqTlDCgT7XxtoRxG1nIlD0so6onohnwECNhF7Bgt7-NmoGqormoKG2j&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==) or below, then find your polling location [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8K0WwDvdpRS5RKPkoon3uz2g7puHbtS_ZBOGNGb9mqR66Lci-Dwjl1C-7ANtJyFa-3zm7tfyCsQ0WHra_H2WBRtBJq7P_roVwK-T-Po8kKwHxEmZI7J3cMI=&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==) \- or by clicking on the button below - and make a plan to vote.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8FqDm_8cZLl5sWAE9P1ZNNQe5HtzqGD7pSggjfNwlYETHBdYOhtBnYqZYAso_vHGS5tFsnLO_cD01Pw0qsQYffqTlDCgT7XxtoRxG1nIlD0so6onohnwECNhF7Bgt7-NmoGqormoKG2j&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==)

| | | [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8K0WwDvdpRS5RKPkoon3uz2g7puHbtS_ZBOGNGb9mqR66Lci-Dwjl1C-7ANtJyFa-3zm7tfyCsQ0WHra_H2WBRtBJq7P_roVwK-T-Po8kKwHxEmZI7J3cMI=&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==)
---
| We also wanted to share several other important things you can do to help us share Kelly's message as we sprint across the finish line.
If you're on Facebook, [please use this temporary profile picture frame to show all of your friends that you support Kelly and David Perdue!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8FqDm_8cZLl5oDwxHFeFj8xav9ng1TmoN2aYj-b-9cfHYKgfnWCzuZCRE37bjSlzgwQVDryTnamAa3iUCdObCOWTTqvp5IUMmddy-JDIkp1WS2fxPanSXJuUpz7LdIgNj0Ltyb8l0qup5yZUoAdjGmw9I7vc11XM4Z1zH94uVr5Z&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==)
If you or anyone you know wants to volunteer for the homestretch of this campaign, [click here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8DZDqNORXG-YatiRbloL7Ry9RsqWC2QdOiZg6kxubuCwypMHzAE9M_D_esCc93V_n94OGnn6bJlX3-adIO_iX85oWV-1aHfD-242qtFKnX3v4lGFsOZV5ME=&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==)
Lastly, this week we released Kelly's FINAL TV ad of this campaign. It lays out exactly what's at stake on Tuesday -- it's our job to STOP SOCIALISM from coming to America. [Watch it here, and help us share it far and wide!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mQI_x83CgIIZiM1I6xWsN08jtzLF35iRZS3BV7YX3i7hcwHO0_vK8FqDm_8cZLl5kbu2F3A0SvIZ8yYe0smBVqT4J2N9kuASYV-Ih2hEcSv-wUhIVgC0qxSclP-sq5eNzr2RuGdZwlj1x40Cq5gKwgJbnjaiwEyop7WwS1NDuURA8Ao-LpQJQq7hZlGs1ki4jmAXGTe9j34=&c=kCnhKsIZKrr0kE_YC0ao8t8ZPigjZZK8GFKE-vO-Co1FrB7VGoaCtw==&ch=S35VcTn14va00zJ_f9IgY2bJTG9qfFB4vtwAsbn4I83mJQcpE_FzLw==)
To Victory!

name: Team Northam
subject: Our last email of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZLNEnf2_5Q6ZoLW_F1UZeq3s28aRu_qCO2bcDGly88M=/2-jlXXhkW6BcWpqV7-BkNVrc6PCiC5U2LCZCS8NvRYI=)
---
Friend, The blue wave rolled across the Commonwealth again in 2020, but in 2021, Trumpism will be back on the ballot as we work to hold the Governor's Mansion and our Blue Majority in the General Assembly. We can't let up. Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. And we were proud to become the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants and other historic criminal justice legislation in a special session. We have made real progress in the Commonwealth because of everything you did. Now, let's cement our progress in 2021 with another big win. **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZLNEnf2_5Q6ZoLW_F1UZeq3s28aRu_qCO2bcDGly88M=/Y5iDXrQjRUY9c14bR9Lm98ljunDPxa-efXBmKWigbrc=)****[Please contribute to The Way Ahead 's Virginia Future Fund before our end of year fundraising deadline tonight at midnight so we can keep our majority and keep Virginia moving forward.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZLNEnf2_5Q6ZoLW_F1UZeq3s28aRu_qCO2bcDGly88M=/Y5iDXrQjRUY9c14bR9Lm98ljunDPxa-efXBmKWigbrc=)** Thanks for all you do. \- Team Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZLNEnf2_5Q6ZoLW_F1UZeq3s28aRu_qCO2bcDGly88M=/yy6DQUxFWdyf_7GU-Qubw3u5_I7p98Sy6o7r9CxZhQA=) |

body:

Peter,
You guys, we are so close but not quite there yet. Will you donate right now and help us reach our goal of $20,000 so we can take full advantage of the 100% match. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
I know we’ve asked a lot of you this year, and thanks to you, our programs are working. You helped us fund our digital program, you helped us fund our data improvement program, and you helped us fund our voter protection program. Thanks to you, all this has helped us mobilize Tennessee Democrats like never before, and we’re excited to keep it up.
We rarely get a match offer on such a big amount, and are really hoping to go into the next year in the best possible position. Can you help us? We have until midnight.

name: Team NHGOP
subject: 2020 ends tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
New Year, New Republican Majorities.

| |
---
Derek,
2020 definitely wasn't what we expected it to be, but it's time to focus on the good things we accomplished.
That includes overwhelmingly re-electing Governor Chris Sununu while taking back our House, Senate, and Executive Council.
We defied predictions and made history, and that was all made possible to you. For everything you did to get Republicans elected in 2020, we sincerely thank you.
We cannot rest on our recent victories - we have to continue to fight and prepare for the next election in order to defend and expand our majorities in the State House so the Republican Party can maintain our majorities for years to come.

clean_body: New Year, New Republican Majorities. | | Derek, 2020 definitely wasn't what we expected it to be, but it's time to focus on the good things we accomplished. That includes overwhelmingly re-electing Governor Chris Sununu while taking back our House, Senate, and Executive Council. We defied predictions and made history, and that was all made possible to you. For everything you did to get Republicans elected in 2020, we sincerely thank you. We cannot rest on our recent victories - we have to continue to fight and prepare for the next election in order to defend and expand our majorities in the State House so the Republican Party can maintain our majorities for years to come. Can you invest in our Every donation goes towards protecting our Republican incumbents while ensuring we have the resources to strengthen our legislative majorities. From Income Taxes to burdensome firearm and business regulations, the policies that are considered under the State House Dome impact us all greatly. Your work in electing Republicans and ensuring a successful 2020 New Hampshire election didn't go unnoticed. \- Team NHGOP Invest to Defend New Hampshire www.nh.gop | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: By this time next year -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dyWIAKQUMnYPU87xs22opfVTHOMpJm69exNGlKo9zDk=/nRyGs5j2OCIHf9RJv4-FZMyWZe9Ds5beMGKxIpsjNz4=)
By this time next year, it's my hope that we'll find ourselves in a much different reality.
A reality in which COVID-19 cases are no longer on the rise, the President is working to heal our nation, and the Senate is _ _ ready and willing to pass legislation to help working families.
In this reality, climate change is treated like the threat it is, the advice of scientists is heeded, _not_ chastised, criminal justice reforms address long-standing biases against people of color, and changes to our immigration system respect the humanity in _everyone_.
To make this future into a reality, however, we'll need leaders who put the needs of working people _first._
As long as I represent California's 38th district, that's exactly what I'll do. I'm ready to continue this work until 2022 and beyond, but to do that, I need the support of folks like yourself.
[**Will you help me keep fighting for working families by chipping in anything you can before my fundraising deadline tonight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dyWIAKQUMnYPU87xs22opfVTHOMpJm69exNGlKo9zDk=/VB36z3gIYY3W79qTaJi4jM0kwu6HJgqs79WZjHkgmLA=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_123120_EOQ_F)

| Peter,
I needed to reach out one last time to see if you can help us reach our goal. 2020 is finally coming to an end, but we need to be in a good position heading into the new year. I've been going over the numbers with my team and we don't have much time left to catch up.
My time in Congress has been spent fighting for the American people. I wholeheartedly endorse the American-First policies of President Trump and the new Republican Party, finally putting the good people of our country at the center of our politics.
To help me continue this fight, will you make a donation before our [deadline tonight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gOxmMPrA-fnJ83LGDbf-DYod8JSiB8-dyjLaMqVY_y_CVdwoBGSWfHY5z77kGHYkDbHnUq-y9EkrV7h6PZgtLBuf5A0j5Pihfqt2XDFLF_rEHztLISw7g_oPVRLw5_4KELZo1P7EgpsmXHvt-UY7wRnz7I6js2cQEExoWNaPdMjymKSidss5Cg==&c=3HYCa8YwMujXausDubOggjBkqlxNg4zEMP2QR1JCwZkqj9QUbo5Duw==&ch=ZmWPztVR-n-JP4FCYRZk-pRfAs2s1wXVyAJXU68RpTW6q9g7MbQvSw==)?

| Every dollar given to our campaign helps me continue to fight for the issues important to you - like getting relief to workers and businesses affected by COVID-19 shutdowns and opening schools and the economy. Other freedoms need defending, which is I'll always defend our freedom of speech from the Tech Tyrants who want to take it away, and fight for our religious liberties when Democrat governors try to prevent people from worshipping. I am fighting to keep America great, but I'm going to need to know you're by my side.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, I needed to reach out one last time to see if you can help us reach our goal. 2020 is finally coming to an end, but we need to be in a good position heading into the new year. I've been going over the numbers with my team and we don't have much time left to catch up. My time in Congress has been spent fighting for the American people. I wholeheartedly endorse the American-First policies of President Trump and the new Republican Party, finally putting the good people of our country at the center of our politics. To help me continue this fight, will you make a donation before our ==? | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Every dollar given to our campaign helps me continue to fight for the issues important to you - like getting relief to workers and businesses affected by COVID-19 shutdowns and opening schools and the economy. Other freedoms need defending, which is I'll always defend our freedom of speech from the Tech Tyrants who want to take it away, and fight for our religious liberties when Democrat governors try to prevent people from worshipping. I am fighting to keep America great, but I'm going to need to know you're by my side. | | | == | Many thanks, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. | | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRGVtYWlsJTJCbG9nbyUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RhcHBlYWwlMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0RPbmUlMkJNb3JlJTJCRW1haWw=&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=408A595A1A8099)

| | Friends-

Before the ball drops on 2020...

This year was a time of great challenge for our communities. But it also allowed us to bond together to overcome a public health and economic crisis like no other.

I am humbled by the confidence voters placed in me to be their voice in the U.S. House of Representatives. As we turn the calendar to a new year, I am ready to get to work next week to make our streets safer, get our economy open again and preserve the American Dream against the threat of socialism.

The 2022 election cycle has already begun, as Nancy Pelosi has expressed her interest in taking this seat back with the help of millions in dark money. After they spent $20 million dollars trying to keep me out of congress, we can't let them get a head start.

[Tonight at midnight not only rings in 2021, but it also marks the final fundraising deadline of 2020. Please help me close out this year strong by making a donation to my campaign of whatever you can afford before the ball drops.](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbSUyRm5pY29sZW1hbGxpb3Rha2lzJTJGZW1haWwlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEYXBwZWFsJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNET25lJTJCTW9yZSUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=408A595A1A8100)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. | Hoosier Republican,

This is our final call to our top supporters! We’re offering special 2021 Gold Card membership in your Indiana Republican Party for just $25, but you need to buy now for this exclusive price.

**We need you on our team,****Hoosier Republican.**

I’m proud to lead our party because of you. Your hard work and generosity are amazing – and it’s that dedication that fuels our fight.
---
| [BECOME A MEMBER >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6e733b42f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "BECOME A MEMBER >>")
---
| We saw a lot of success in the 2020 election. We went RED for President Trump, we won the hotly contested race in the 5th District, we re-elected Governor Holcomb with record votes, we elected Todd Rokita as our next attorney general, and we’ve expanded our party’s leaders at the county level, too.

Now is not the time to rest on our laurels. The Democrat machine is already hard at work, coordinating their next plan of attack to bring a blue wave to Indiana. **Help us keep our conservative momentum going by becoming a Gold Card member today!**

Happy New Year, and I’ll see you all in 2021!

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

body:
Let me be blunt: we need your help right now to defeat the Radical Left, or it will be too late. RUSH IN A GRASSROOTS DONATION TO WIN GEORGIA>>>

Friend,

We're just hours away from the End of Year deadline, and I'm reaching out one final time to our top grassroots supporters.

Let me be blunt: we need your help right now to defeat the Radical Left, **_or it will be too late._** [**Will you chip in right now before the biggest deadline of the year?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00167EWP7N3_eZlL406WVv-a1FYyWPuveTbDUva3thBnUWvhezR09nAgrpR_jyfHg7-Nz4GhZ508uFBCRpJwFFXbb9c64xy-t_iGMwQcZcL0QM9rf4VWNqN4TAdsx5pCD8b4Nt8e0PO4vSZUgl5nTKAH8mlqTyvnUejtU_OeHq3Ve0Zsrh2z1ubhuiNtj55_CvDeh2cCcHdIaeS84qf7JDq6SE_w1ytEBRr6o6JT8Ig1ygUYGpGn1vXpK4MmxKUtLuRRUraAmgwyJpdAwrCe6Zn0Kb0IW1A-ZjL1TK86aK-x66JgLspXnu5L_y7lMkHse9w_NbEKbnbMLsV75Tfn5WLxItxE-ksHL2fFaBvbEaz025Upsbw5Pi1vqYaHiTNMTKm7BPVp1IzYxqbsJxtvq0fl55OIzct0gNJ&c=v5l4TaQ7C1uEW5eCpTnG_g5mFL6aZHKq04fdpg5I00GnXqDEqNRbqg==&ch=NXQ9Pc5PeiaXlnDrqgu-JWqkVGqFR5EgxNoAl44Z-uIplkO-FbS1Jw==)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: How will we end 2020?
body:
Peter,
It would be an understatement to say that 2020 was a wild year.
I, for one, will be happy to put it in the rearview mirror.
But with a new year comes new opportunities and the chance to kick things off in a fresh and focused way.
As Honorary National Chairman of My Faith Votes, we’ve made great progress this year.
Our grassroots base around the country has grown larger and stronger, and with your help we’ll be able to face the inevitable fights and challenges of 2021 head on.
The first and most pressing is the Georgia runoff on January 5th, which will determine control of the U.S. Senate.
But beyond that, the disturbing cracks in our progress of the last few years are already beginning to form. There is no more poignant example than Joe Biden’s choice of Xavier Becerra – the radical, pro-abortion Attorney General of California – as Secretary of Health & Human Services. For those of us who believe in biblical values, it will be our duty to hold leaders such as him accountable.
[**With the fights of 2021 set to begin in just hours, I ask you to make one final, tax-deductible donation of the year now. If we can raise $100,000 in grassroots donations it will unlock a matching grant, which will double the size of your gift, and we are very, very close.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndam&n=1 "Donate Now!")****
So, please stand with us this year, as we prepare to fight for your biblical values in the years ahead.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndam&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndam&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndam&n=4).

Friend,

Our FEC End-of-Year Deadline is TONIGHT.

This is our FINAL fundraising deadline of the YEAR, and it’s our most important EVER. The stakes have never been higher, but I noticed you haven’t stepped up to help us CRUSH our goal. Why is that?

Friend,

2020 was a challenging year, but we still managed to achieve a lot thanks to your support.

[Will you help us get off to a strong start in 2021 with a donation today?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=316ef1a6b1b64be6ae0598bb4e951d3c&_e=Tbkbibav2gkfmUnDqToTdwFzJrE6UIOp2cFu6UdYMYExZAk0d70B1jAmpS984HnSUPxUeV_vZ2LzwAg6P7Az7LpbSsDmSX7WQ2Zws7TANOjJ0VIrdXv3SE-hlUcPx0Fu5Wt6FP0sJIO0UjvYd6kHL8Ojl-GYc1JaYbWlxAbFWMWQJngosB9_ZYJxZGyTKB23vBR_UFs_46AQi1K4WuzvA9vJzacA2z8wDVb6joeU4hQSPiik9umHPp0AU0UOUAA_P-V5XxCH2BzrF3rSpQ-pPhGSPvRw8kDDsbuOTeQfe2Q%3D)

**Our campaign has set a goal of raising $2021 before the year is up and we would really appreciate it if you could help us reach it.**
[Donate Today](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=316ef1a6b1b64be6ae0598bb4e951d3c&_e=Tbkbibav2gkfmUnDqToTdwFzJrE6UIOp2cFu6UdYMYExZAk0d70B1jAmpS984HnSUPxUeV_vZ2LzwAg6P7Az7KFzvIZGa1KL3JRMFvTiw4lG1-u7ecD4RNPiNZCHPd8So8ph_bbo8T2T0-GkgoCsoOyl7-H_tcxxiRn_Tp17uB5Xz27ot6_uphmd-jdYfsuSo4DD0JLTSm1Kn1nJqQYPwr2HqoACXbkKp4BMvfIpqDezXD35rGPqLg3I2SSyVkkvIRknFA-eptzQSTwsn_0eWJFsaNs_aS3OMLrPcrzfPLU%3D)
You can bet Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi have all kinds of tricks up their sleeves. If we don’t start preparing now, we’ll be on the defensive from day one. **I need your help to kick start 2021 with a strong message: we will not give in.**

Remember, Democrats far out-raised Republicans in 2020, and my Democrat opponent got more votes than any other Democrat in the district EVER. Thankfully, we still won and the GOP flipped 12 House seats. Just imagine what we can accomplish if we can catch up in the fundraising department.

**We could flip the House and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all!**

[I know expenses run high around this time of the year, but if you could spare just $25 it will help me and my team fight for our conservative values at a time when it matters most.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=316ef1a6b1b64be6ae0598bb4e951d3c&_e=Tbkbibav2gkfmUnDqToTdwFzJrE6UIOp2cFu6UdYMYExZAk0d70B1jAmpS984HnSUPxUeV_vZ2LzwAg6P7Az7CmpeBMtQVg6bD3ZYT8w824DeP-19XE_qEIkNU75rRKz9w_JzS_AYLy_s0WRFMgIcniJFVsLzap8Jb6s14NHjCcnM2DD3TLoDwSNQWYJZYZ_HjjYZKcC2b8Ti1iCc3QsoXgYUZP6hSd9TL7jXX6_jwdZNxDVFbuRVPY4BQwlW89K1sD8bhx-B49pfwe320xLLWQIggqBhvrbYauBL2JI93s%3D)

**By reporting strong numbers to the FEC on Dec. 31 we can show that Americans are ready to fight for our country, small government, and religious liberty.**

That’s why we set this goal and that’s why we’re hoping you can help us reach it.
[Donate Today](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=316ef1a6b1b64be6ae0598bb4e951d3c&_e=Tbkbibav2gkfmUnDqToTdwFzJrE6UIOp2cFu6UdYMYExZAk0d70B1jAmpS984HnSUPxUeV_vZ2LzwAg6P7Az7HizF_LvoPk_oIA2dQICYVmYu_roI23W8d5ukuATm2Q1WCvMf25cj-6p0MQoa7b7_xpRl9TBHIidzwQA_IC0jzWjgbTSm7bVvSrYgKFv8v_6vPXMGxWJjp4Q-qlPYCTStqkAHSz6AWGFnCeuokTwNZKIlS0mBIxg7W6LGn2SPwF6_RMc4yQM62OVH6X_fH_2AW72AB14fXMKVO8DmfPY1kc%3D)
Thank you for your ongoing support,
Tim Burchett

[P.S. Your donation today will help me combat socialist policies like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Let’s show the liberals what we’re made of. Thank you in advance!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=316ef1a6b1b64be6ae0598bb4e951d3c&_e=Tbkbibav2gkfmUnDqToTdwFzJrE6UIOp2cFu6UdYMYExZAk0d70B1jAmpS984HnSUPxUeV_vZ2LzwAg6P7Az7GclSgsyu1Q9FyXtmwfy-JI77_04PUYiVLKkngApD-Z1vqaYKWUUPiklHwrmZi59Wl7F0QhpmNPEKBSOCgS47A4LEyIfkwmzaKMhiDqbL_jAdm9N6G8-7b3aAiiFjT1zvg-baXdcBere2b337jYFfYg3sjAoiu7n3PYIEaIIQkHs6-EV6lhSMxzi8OGquY07qesgF0q9gzhT3acwsh5kTyo%3D)

You can bet Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi have all kinds of tricks up their sleeves. If we don’t start preparing now, we’ll be on the defensive from day one. I need your help to kick start 2021 with a strong message: we will not give in. Remember, Democrats far out-raised Republicans in 2020, and my Democrat opponent got more votes than any other Democrat in the district EVER. Thankfully, we still won and the GOP flipped 12 House seats. Just imagine what we can accomplish if we can catch up in the fundraising department. We could flip the House and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all! By reporting strong numbers to the FEC on Dec. 31 we can show that Americans are ready to fight for our country, small government, and religious liberty. That’s why we set this goal and that’s why we’re hoping you can help us reach it. Thank you for your ongoing support, Tim Burchett | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Only you can fix this, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Our critical end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away and reaching our goal is our first line of defense against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vHTFdUq2vEEUusOdlmiY1QbNmEqdNDznp4a9g2QOmBqzzOJlS4oa_ZtSecoCdAfPVCIggdMFalf45DKxps1nWDtKiQoI1xOOf-a9KIa9fAiHJyETo0I7GvUnYqa7JV1VhPNOEMb28k4d4LwZdWsCx63TPQwMCjYDhV_zLe8Kx046LG4SWAOF5JwCsoHTsuSxfdgPVsktGpU3PR5jM4QpPf-FmNXbKlvV3iPwzaC0U7GVOFqtsFtrcDcoP-aknlF-ajLWX01eMMloJeixZ4QzOHffhDDKZagBObkR6YzoQWyOZk-p08lVv7zzE_sGJVeEl8E4ODvssTRa2fmq1ZvsMglKmxfE9WiYgeTkdcpiyERFfBvligV4r9vOlANKubIedeJvnIagoa2ykLCxJ7jBNKm_9F9tKz9jZUH59tDQr0dLLUmC9glBpA==&c=tesDmlGY6pl9Ylr7CTRBZwy18Qd9fgWMU4xdcqarlmry9OnPVRBPIA==&ch=v2cWTHyIhr0msLEUnw2PXgsWQflV60caIj-NMx4CDd-7s7clsLI0SQ==)
When I came to America searching for opportunity with the hope of a better future. I watched my mother -- a single mom and small business owner -- struggle, unable to fight against a faltering tax system because she didn't have the resources. After seeing just how broken our political system was, I knew I needed to help those who couldn't help themselves.

Since then, I returned over $400 million to taxpayers, promised to oppose any new taxes, and pledged to fight against any tax increases.

**But right now, Friend, I need your help. Our FINAL FEC deadline is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT and my team just gave me some bad news -- we are $6,198.18 short of where we need to be to defend this seat from Nancy Pelosi 's dark money and the Far Left's attacks.**

[**Can I count on you to rush in a donation right now to defend this seat from the Radical Left?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vHTFdUq2vEEUusOdlmiY1QbNmEqdNDznp4a9g2QOmBqzzOJlS4oa_UX7tvMcUARIkXCA7jFGK1g-JsakC6OkKWvqafu93Gg_hgWMKGLLhqKlKtxD7XwZ1O2GguqTwkSP8k84Yz2I2Gy3CNHyTtnKJsdh_-Ka362h5nyMAotq5fVwuajhnFRi4qGvumDvuTOdJA1zRpUC2DaztbhWPvnm-6YQX3usbJIOezt7Jq4bBvPtnUfrQ6EI9E4gtVSVG-ZHGdsokK48DRFgHKyRjgy7muXqwJ6GAs3CIejLDNHXDZL3nISQ6DHbGnh1fMmbFzFirJEjyV1vaf2_xeCvsGrWrGxwTwKOUjbPWrHNjU_0lg6NM9aJDfZbiPeL67cDqV3yX3Y-uQTbQd3Lcbg1JGOMSYLrh9ylAlPAnMqlrgpQnqOJYagh0-uEzg==&c=tesDmlGY6pl9Ylr7CTRBZwy18Qd9fgWMU4xdcqarlmry9OnPVRBPIA==&ch=v2cWTHyIhr0msLEUnw2PXgsWQflV60caIj-NMx4CDd-7s7clsLI0SQ==) _Our critical end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away and reaching our goal is our first line of defense against Pelosi 's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests._

Pelosi's candidate -- the very same candidate we defeated -- is gunning for a rematch. To defeat him, Pelosi, and the Left's dark money machine, we're going to need all hands on deck. [**That means we 're going to need you, Friend.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vHTFdUq2vEEUusOdlmiY1QbNmEqdNDznp4a9g2QOmBqzzOJlS4oa_UX7tvMcUARIkXCA7jFGK1g-JsakC6OkKWvqafu93Gg_hgWMKGLLhqKlKtxD7XwZ1O2GguqTwkSP8k84Yz2I2Gy3CNHyTtnKJsdh_-Ka362h5nyMAotq5fVwuajhnFRi4qGvumDvuTOdJA1zRpUC2DaztbhWPvnm-6YQX3usbJIOezt7Jq4bBvPtnUfrQ6EI9E4gtVSVG-ZHGdsokK48DRFgHKyRjgy7muXqwJ6GAs3CIejLDNHXDZL3nISQ6DHbGnh1fMmbFzFirJEjyV1vaf2_xeCvsGrWrGxwTwKOUjbPWrHNjU_0lg6NM9aJDfZbiPeL67cDqV3yX3Y-uQTbQd3Lcbg1JGOMSYLrh9ylAlPAnMqlrgpQnqOJYagh0-uEzg==&c=tesDmlGY6pl9Ylr7CTRBZwy18Qd9fgWMU4xdcqarlmry9OnPVRBPIA==&ch=v2cWTHyIhr0msLEUnw2PXgsWQflV60caIj-NMx4CDd-7s7clsLI0SQ==)

The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- _a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED_ \-- is a top-target. This race will be one of the toughest in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again.

But first, we have to reach our goal before tonight's midnight deadline. We have only 24 hours to go. clean_body: Our critical end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away and reaching our goal is our first line of defense against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests. ** . == When I came to America searching for opportunity with the hope of a better future. I watched my mother -- a single mom and small business owner -- struggle, unable to fight against a faltering tax system because she didn't have the resources. After seeing just how broken our political system was, I knew I needed to help those who couldn't help themselves. Since then, I returned over $400 million to taxpayers, promised to oppose any new taxes, and pledged to fight against any tax increases. But right now, Friend, I need your help. Our FINAL FEC deadline is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT and my team just gave me some bad news -- we are $6,198.18 short of where we need to be to defend this seat from Nancy Pelosi 's dark money and the Far Left's attacks.** == Our critical end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away and reaching our goal is our first line of defense against Pelosi 's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests. Pelosi's candidate -- the very same candidate we defeated -- is gunning for a rematch. To defeat him, Pelosi, and the Left's dark money machine, we're going to need all hands on deck. == The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED \-- is a top-target. This race will be one of the toughest in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again. But first, we have to reach our goal before tonight's midnight deadline. We have only 24 hours to go. == Michelle Steel == | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: UPDATE GEORGIA | True the Vote v. Stacey Abrams
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZnYS1jaGFsbGVuZ2Vycy1zdGFuZC1maXJtLWFnYWluc3QtYXR0YWNrcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3737)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I will keep this brief, we need your help.
As you know, we are on the ground in Atlanta, Georgia. Here's what's going on....
---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRjgyWHlPdW9NQ2I0&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3773)
---
| | We are running a statewide election integrity hotline to support voters and election workers. We are hosting election worker training and signature verification courses. We provided the data and research to preemptively challenge 364,541 voters who appear to be ineligible to vote in the upcoming run-off election. We are actively working with volunteers across the state of Georgia to support their presentation of these challenges. Now, [Stacy Abrams and Fair Fight, in an effort to stop us, sued us in Federal Court.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLWFicmFtcy1zaXN0ZXJzLXJ1bGluZy13cm9uZy1vbi1sYXctY2xlYXItY29uZmxpY3QlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3774) We are being attacked, the volunteers working with us are being attacked - and we are all standing firm.
In my experience, the only time you draw this kind of fire is when you're over the target. We are in the battle, we are over the target, and **[we need your support](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3743) **to continue funding the work. There have been individual citizens looped into the Fair Fight lawsuit, we are covering their expenses. We are helping Georgia counties who have also been sued by [Marc Elias](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyLTE4LTIwMjAtTlZSQS1MZXR0ZXItR3dpbm5ldHQtQ291bnR5LnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3775) and other organizations. We are supporting statewide research and investigation. And, we are still working across the country, with citizens, organizations, litigators, and legislatures! Your donations directly fund this work.
---
| | [ HELP DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3743)
---
| | Our country is in the midst of a great awakening. Election Integrity has been in jeopardy for many, many years. In 2020, under the fog of COVID, there was a full court press to push it over the edge. And now, in Georgia, we have the opportunity to hold the line, to reassert the power of the voter, and not kowtow to the culture of compliance that is being forced on us all.
Working together, we really can true the vote. It will not be easy, it will not be fast, but it must be done, and it must be done by the people.
We will not be silenced. Stand with us.

Onward,
---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote, Founder
---
| | P.S. Here's more about what we're doing in Georgia right now. [Please help us if you can.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=355A844A20A3743)

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, I will keep this brief, we need your help. As you know, we are on the ground in Atlanta, Georgia. Here's what's going on.... | | | | We are running a statewide election integrity hotline to support voters and election workers. We are hosting election worker training and signature verification courses. We provided the data and research to preemptively challenge 364,541 voters who appear to be ineligible to vote in the upcoming run-off election. We are actively working with volunteers across the state of Georgia to support their presentation of these challenges. Now, We are being attacked, the volunteers working with us are being attacked - and we are all standing firm. In my experience, the only time you draw this kind of fire is when you're over the target. We are in the battle, we are over the target, and to continue funding the work. There have been individual citizens looped into the Fair Fight lawsuit, we are covering their expenses. We are helping Georgia counties who have also been sued by and other organizations. We are supporting statewide research and investigation. And, we are still working across the country, with citizens, organizations, litigators, and legislatures! Your donations directly fund this work. | | | | Our country is in the midst of a great awakening. Election Integrity has been in jeopardy for many, many years. In 2020, under the fog of COVID, there was a full court press to push it over the edge. And now, in Georgia, we have the opportunity to hold the line, to reassert the power of the voter, and not kowtow to the culture of compliance that is being forced on us all. Working together, we really can true the vote. It will not be easy, it will not be fast, but it must be done, and it must be done by the people. We will not be silenced. Stand with us. Onward, | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht True the Vote, Founder | | P.S. Here's more about what we're doing in Georgia right now. That’s why until MIDNIGHT ON NEW YEAR’S DAY, every donation I receive will be split 1:1 to help Republicans win in Georgia Final Goal of 2020: $200,000.00 Georgia Battleground Fund Split Peter, the stakes for the future of our country have never been higher. Democrats have already shown they have nothing but contempt for you and your Constitutional rights. If they win these seats in November, they will no doubt trample on your remaining rights. What will you do to save America from this impending wave of socialism? Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: I'm reaching out to you because your 2020 membership to the NRCC expires at midnight tonight. Fellow Conservative, I'm reaching out to you because your 2020 membership to the NRCC expires at midnight tonight. In order to remain an active member for 2021, you must renew your membership before midnight tonight. == == == In a time when radical Democrats push an ever leftward agenda, being a member means you are a top Conservative who is willing to fight for our values, and help make our country great again! This is your last chance to maintain your membership. I cannot stress how important it is that you do not miss this deadline. == Thank you, NRCC HQ == Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). body:
We have to pull out all the stops to defend this seat and win the House Majority for Republicans.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UbLKdmVx-DW4wvqOtrJcIuBEbqNMC-pUZdzEazgG42MWFv0jJoYlHKHQ4jkJaf10p4EIc_oKLc3RBSu78vbjN5N8-pDRE_TsiM97NoB7mvbfTCi8fZ-CpRkS0kOJGvXEL39_yXqWdqnDQwg6lXTEpMDqBkCggo5ZyH8qDYqUwcuc9qacoSebve3fVFGazBNjc2A0zqVWxQgXiwVivw6IaNNZXzpKU3WE7TOTXxIh0xVIEyL_5MkNNh1BY3U0MQOJf_rTCjVFSASsAOmI2l78JlkdmIvGsOLS_0jZT1kycJMDa2xnYqSvIqgAbHWAheVeYyKaRQFhZ1FjAOp-V-k7QFmAo_QBwPVfjuXLEH5XRXP7uObocSwcAEwW6N1N0dGAvUfk08xVwX_UjE9OWLSFzXPOXT6tgJQs3Dm7-tPGz8=&c=LwrPO5XYyyojbfBfzgTg21qwFwVFBZGtOUHacJAhjeIuvEhgO8DiIg==&ch=MqOBACJcn--AkoGibGNiwFqhzA47xWwRo-wxq4Q0JFVmnAFHPc1nLQ==)
---
Friend, I know better than most what it feels like to be targeted by the Far Left. _I 'm exactly who the Washington Democrats don't want in Congress: Immigrant. Woman. Conservative. _

They want to get rid of California of common sense voices -- but we can't let them. I'm ready to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. But first, I need your help, Friend.

**The FEC 's end of quarter deadline is hours away. **This is our FINAL deadline of 2020 and reaching our goal is 100% necessary to defending this seat and flipping the House RED! [**Can you rush in an emergency donation to thwart Pelosi 's attacks and take back the House for Republicans?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UbLKdmVx-DW4wvqOtrJcIuBEbqNMC-pUZdzEazgG42MWFv0jJoYlOx3UoQz1L0Sf_Be7B0cLdG92Mgd9ukdY-37HuJ0DhBlnp2zxAsApB6MobQPcexI0c_zkCuwGgMi4Te_0eWxLOoyBb33ciJWfOllE0tNB9-WtDvqH9v1AS6xlBZA29GXGS614dZihd7mgErAZxbO1vsyHw8q9nTygiea-aqB7y4YItQXSWN4ym899CiUC5dUt5rPeiq1zoiK4F13lvMtk21pb0ObkDFtY0Um9E-H5BM505uxY8rdE2Al950xYpVceaie8akbytM1l50ac6VD1bpwYPX4Ip2z4In8VxqJI0nyKj2jvKTJUHu1of4wwPx0gt0xmZKG3BmZEVtqRAHjmgH2i5-JV8iUFmSedjDFBe7ZgFwvJR7c7Ec=&c=LwrPO5XYyyojbfBfzgTg21qwFwVFBZGtOUHacJAhjeIuvEhgO8DiIg==&ch=MqOBACJcn--AkoGibGNiwFqhzA47xWwRo-wxq4Q0JFVmnAFHPc1nLQ==)

In this election, the Democrats spent over $20 million against us and it is safe to assume that number will multiply. Hitting our goal ensures we have the resources, the infrastructure, and the grassroots team to fight back -- falling short puts victory in jeopardy.

**_And with Pelosi 's House Majority hanging on by a thread, we can't take any chances. _Not when whoever wins this House race has a strong chance of determining who controls Congress.**

[**Friend, I need to know I have your support.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UbLKdmVx-DW4wvqOtrJcIuBEbqNMC-pUZdzEazgG42MWFv0jJoYlOx3UoQz1L0Sf_Be7B0cLdG92Mgd9ukdY-37HuJ0DhBlnp2zxAsApB6MobQPcexI0c_zkCuwGgMi4Te_0eWxLOoyBb33ciJWfOllE0tNB9-WtDvqH9v1AS6xlBZA29GXGS614dZihd7mgErAZxbO1vsyHw8q9nTygiea-aqB7y4YItQXSWN4ym899CiUC5dUt5rPeiq1zoiK4F13lvMtk21pb0ObkDFtY0Um9E-H5BM505uxY8rdE2Al950xYpVceaie8akbytM1l50ac6VD1bpwYPX4Ip2z4In8VxqJI0nyKj2jvKTJUHu1of4wwPx0gt0xmZKG3BmZEVtqRAHjmgH2i5-JV8iUFmSedjDFBe7ZgFwvJR7c7Ec=&c=LwrPO5XYyyojbfBfzgTg21qwFwVFBZGtOUHacJAhjeIuvEhgO8DiIg==&ch=MqOBACJcn--AkoGibGNiwFqhzA47xWwRo-wxq4Q0JFVmnAFHPc1nLQ==) November's victory was hard-fought and hard-won, and the road ahead of us won't be any easier. This remains one of the toughest races in the nation.

We have to pull out all the stops to defend this seat and win the House Majority.

To victory,

Young Kim

* * *
_During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --[**endorse Young Kim here!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UbLKdmVx-DW4wvqOtrJcIuBEbqNMC-pUZdzEazgG42MWFv0jJoYlEOJkOjetvT1fgpaXFWpRuOA9MGBqjjupdVlwPVQQEKpgy5paHZYlmUbDRlSuN4BNHdX7RPML-cQi2T3jNakCxh1E3RCKFRo9bGvdJOKsUZtfBKS0U3O32EUHBGefROLI-k8sz2YIpSs1RvsnC8QjujdwKCfBt1quTDP5-GJsitOCP6JxkTTmEp55dyjEhdehCKnyc3o5SoucO_cBsz0Jd8ibImNh8LeVaq7EqsP3_P8w20uv5J4xVAI9LIsSTfHQlfxdQQxbDHLpE1Rg3_frv-KpR0DaNQp2JUZuVrXig0fh7AdZ6xJyfXHANRLx9cObQX10yNlA1g7-wXeaWevrCseVpihDKZaeMcspYv4I9Dl&c=LwrPO5XYyyojbfBfzgTg21qwFwVFBZGtOUHacJAhjeIuvEhgO8DiIg==&ch=MqOBACJcn--AkoGibGNiwFqhzA47xWwRo-wxq4Q0JFVmnAFHPc1nLQ==)_

subject: FWD It's not too late…
body:
Open this email to see how you can help Judicial Watch!

Dear Fellow American,

I thought it was important for you to see this from Tom.

Judicial Watch is carrying its biggest case load ever into 2021.

[Please help today with your most generous gift!.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52487&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIzMTE1NDAyNg==)

Thank you,

Steve Andersen
Director of Development
Judicial Watch

| Dear Fellow American,

The clock is ticking down on 2020, but there is still time to help Judicial Watch with a tax-deductible gift!

**Will you help once more by**** _[making an extra donation to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52487&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMzExNTQwMjY=)_****?**
Because of your regular monthly _Amicus Society_ support, we are fighting for you and for the rule of law with greater impact than ever.

And your **_[extra donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52487&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMzExNTQwMjY=)_** will help us continue:
* **Uncovering** the facts behind Biden family influence peddling schemes in Ukraine and China;
* **Exposing** the illicit Deep State conspiracy targeting President Trump;
* **Fighting** for honest elections across the country;
* **Suing** sanctuary cities that protect illegal aliens contrary to federal law;
* **Holding** corrupt politicians accountable;
* **Educating** the American people about the dangers of out-of-control government secrecy.

[**Please help us with your best year-end gift today!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52487&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMzExNTQwMjY=)

And Happy New Year!
Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: When we wake up tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
Peter, we made it to the last day of 2020. And while the year is going to change, the issues we’re facing right now won’t -- not unless we act. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywJqYyCHISq8r4iwz6OcMpIPuAQAdgHxVuRnoJSXUmqpn8Qqz1LZLcd2VeuXCRXcdtQenMYww4uqfVOsFM-w4gCYpgvPseXoeeTUd4P0NpCmGygrj1QAF7-Mdd5opaZBVwDifpNXHspiO6o6Gu9sat6OMzlTeH0w0t6kkOa5pjZrDWHqdYzlEyg0maEc2EE_Jz3lDxpuLAtFuGHg4hAEz1sirTRRY3uJTCrervjxeLBpt8KQpHvtHlVdoSOq3AFgJ_3NzJF2CfLumlAsGW3kG5ktMp4NKGaJNkzF7QRtCmydwsX432Vl0Eg95NsCYP1ySKVqaA482qZIzCjvNQhkE99oI6YSAJQs1ztbkNM_vmJQ/386/ST7ysUEORRWaWC3T9VAc9Q/h0/niX7OASJNb12JbBML1azTHVI7gHtSj7bUu4QdhH60eU)
---
_This is the last day to prove that our people-powered campaign can win this race and create a Virginia that works for everyone. That means we need as many grassroots supporters as possible to step up.**[Will you take a stand with me and chip in any amount before our midnight public filing deadline?_**
---
[ Chip in -> ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywJqYyCHISq8r4iwz6OcMp-2bn9_Iuy6e5Exk8FhS68RNgFKkTEBedzW8uibs1Ivh5CzQRbukULURRUbFlNvgxua1DyXI3S-4eOhfziTGUW77IsMfimUFRrUoheeK00ISZD8wSgm_CGMjzvJHihknJDrdS9MJ7TtvajOxVuOwLzGahvl-7pe-FgQsbl9oVTW6zh6d9pxM25wPYH6-6LW8lvRhxc7Av0AE0_o9UUzaIcx1DYfAtecz8MADcuXJGA_GXhwKv34dD4DFMMIR62ggYtID4YlBpRWQp5vx-2DStaTB0fddxArc0joCczznHzRvNqWLJ4r_lFFTMKd7L218OEoYsIFjh450D6CawXChcgj09zX34zsauB08C0yotBY4/386/ST7ysUEORRWaWC3T9VAc9Q/h2/XYsWhpaoCfJFXGWiRXt5zCJH3XMmps0k2qv62F_5vdg)
---
Peter, we made it to the last day of 2020. And while the year is going to change, the issues we’re facing right now won’t -- not unless we act.
---
When we wake up tomorrow, more than 800,000 Virginians will still be living in poverty.
---
Nearly 10% of Virginians will still suffer from food insecurity.
---
Richmond, Hampton, Norfolk, Newport News, and Chesapeake will still be 5 of the top 10 cities with the highest eviction rates _in the entire country._
---
All this in a Commonwealth with one of the best economies in the nation.
---
These statistics are heartbreaking. Having grown up in a neglected city and served as a public defender, I know that these are more than just numbers. They are my neighbors, clients, friends and family members -- and they can’t keep living with a broken status quo that doesn’t provide the help they need.
---
But I have more hope this year than ever, Peter.
---
We have the resources to solve these crises. The only question is whether or not we elect a Governor who will make solving them a priority.
---
2021 is our chance. We need to leave these shameful statistics in the past, along with the antiquated style of politics that brought us to this point. **It’s time the needs of working families came first and foremost --_this is our moment._**
---
**[Peter, let’s wake up tomorrow knowing we took action to make this new year better than the last. Will you invest in this campaign right now and help hit our critical public reporting goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywJqYyCHISq8r4iwz6OcMp-2bn9_Iuy6e5Exk8FhS68RNgFKkTEBedzW8uibs1Ivh5CzQRbukULURRUbFlNvgxua1DyXI3S-4eOhfziTGUW77IsMfimUFRrUoheeK00IRYhYFbJ6SMKYi0fgWxcacNoFsgNXZ05qq6bFmZCB3CCSisfwC2SM7OeIOp3bbbg57eQSmlk6urmWGt4xLD-X-z8u7gDZck4k1EtDvide4WB11TMvj5t3qJiwQN8BCGof-Cx6piqemnfNNIr57qlncw2nHG3Y3oP_sme7OAGpRpHBX29IhtVfE9eAcjmcTCLBur0OebD9k-uWD0JbhYmaWWy18dX9-asQICBmIWY0UEsfMzWQyxLgaF3FhimWgEaEY/386/ST7ysUEORRWaWC3T9VAc9Q/h3/WyNB1uVE3dTnP-MOVXcFuLWbsHz8ui4p5OlBfQ0YT1k)**

clean_body: Peter, we made it to the last day of 2020. And while the year is going to change, the issues we’re facing right now won’t -- not unless we act. | | This is the last day to prove that our people-powered campaign can win this race and create a Virginia that works for everyone. That means we need as many grassroots supporters as possible to step up. Peter, we made it to the last day of 2020. And while the year is going to change, the issues we’re facing right now won’t -- not unless we act. When we wake up tomorrow, more than 800,000 Virginians will still be living in poverty. Nearly 10% of Virginians will still suffer from food insecurity. Richmond, Hampton, Norfolk, Newport News, and Chesapeake will still be 5 of the top 10 cities with the highest eviction rates in the entire country. All this in a Commonwealth with one of the best economies in the nation. These statistics are heartbreaking. Having grown up in a neglected city and served as a public defender, I know that these are more than just numbers. They are my neighbors, clients, friends and family members -- and they can’t keep living with a broken status quo that doesn’t provide the help they need. But I have more hope this year than ever, Peter. We have the resources to solve these crises. The only question is whether or not we elect a Governor who will make solving them a priority. 2021 is our chance. We need to leave these shameful statistics in the past, along with the antiquated style of politics that brought us to this point. It’s time the needs of working families came first and foremost --this is our moment. ** \-- Jennifer Carroll Foy | | Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg and was one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute. Jennifer then served as a public defender and foster mom. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her two terms as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth's most vulnerable communities. | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . name: Kat Cammack
subject: Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) Names Powerhouse Senior Staff & Campaign Team
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001stKLTGRTMVf5MEEPKwSPavWuzwWzFhSgeXnTXASC8-wO2BAHlZHkGPAdTIArnjM5WrIaInTVaIHWXC5zqLDGhB4AKPNXIvIFqHJtBmQP0D_a-TOz7GBEY8u8Wnd9mLgkpvv7OjXFK8ZASEjnT55V2Q==&c=MazBEmy3ByprNVzHQ0egkgiTDt9ZVsU-EYn7cwy_MgQGYdbKN8z1qw==&ch=C54DCCjgG2wo8Wt7h1obkf4lSVoajuSexBf3P53SX88h1xG578Eu9A==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE December 31, 2020
MEDIA CONTACTS Derek Dufresne, derek@rightvoter.com Adeline Sandridge, adeline.sandridge@gmail.com
Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) Names Powerhouse Senior Staff & Campaign Team
WASHINGTON, D.C. - Today U.S. Representative-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) announced the members of her powerhouse team in the Washington, D.C. and district offices and her Florida campaign operations team.
The top-notch legislative team includes Cammack's chief of staff, deputy chief of staff, legislative director, communications director, constituent advocacy director, and veterans and military liaison. The experienced, dynamic campaign team includes general consultants, fundraisers, and PAC experts.
"I'm proud of the strong, talented individuals we have brought together to form the FL-03 team. The constituents of Florida's 3rd District deserve the best and I believe we have put together a senior political and policy operation designed to deliver superior service and representation in our Nation's Capitol. We're excited to pursue an aggressive and meaningful legislative agenda during my first term in office and I know this team will be instrumental to our success," said Cammack of her Capitol Hill and district team. "I also look forward to working alongside the powerful political team led by Derek, Kevin, and Andrew as they continue to build an unparalleled fundraising and networking operation for the campaign."
Official Federal Staff Biographies:
Larry Calhoun, Chief of Staff: Calhoun joins Congresswoman-Elect Cammack's team as chief of staff with over 12 years of Capitol Hill experience. Most recently, he served as chief of staff to Rep. Ted Yoho prior to his retirement. Calhoun is a graduate of the University of Florida and was born and raised in the Sunshine State.
Jessica Norfleet, Deputy Chief of Staff: Norfleet joins Cammack's team after eight years of service as district director on Rep. Ted Yoho's staff. She is a licensed general contractor and longtime business owner with extensive working knowledge of the industries in FL-03. Norfleet is a wife and mother to two children and a vocal advocate for small business and agriculture.
Joshua Woodward, Legislative Director: Woodward will continue his service to Florida's 3rd District as Cammack's legislative director. Born in North Carolina and a graduate of the University of North Carolina Chapel Hill, he started his congressional service with former RSC chair Mark Walker and worked on agriculture and trade issues for Rep. Yoho until his retirement.
Adeline Sandridge, Communications Director: Sandridge joins Cammack's team after working at D.C. public affairs firm Hamilton Place Strategies. In this new role, she will oversee all communications efforts for Congresswoman-Elect Cammack's office, including digital and social media, press, and more. Sandridge is a proud graduate of the University of Virginia's Frank Batten School of Leadership and Public Policy.
Dorothy Richardson, Constituent Advocacy Director: Richardson joins Cammack's team with eight years of service to the constituents of FL-03, overseeing constituent relations, casework, and advocacy. She is a proud graduate of the University of Florida, devoted wife of 23 years to husband Brian, and mother to three children.
Dave Hill, Veterans and Military Liaison: Hill serves as the Veterans and Military Liaison on Cammack's team, introducing his 26 years of experience in the Air Force and 22 years at Florida's Department of Veteran Affairs to serve veterans across the district. Hill works to navigate the cumbersome benefits system to deliver results for Florida's heroes.
Campaign Staff Biographies
Derek Dufresne & RightVoter Team, General Campaign Consultants: Dufresne is a partner and co-founder at D.C.-based firm RightVoter, where he and his team served as then-candidate Cammack's general consultants during the 10-way Republican primary and general election in FL-03. Dufresne and his team will continue their work on the campaign side, advising Representative-Elect Cammack in all campaign-related political, fundraising, and communications activities.
Kevin Hofmann, Florida Fundraising: Hofmann is the owner of the Archmann Group and will join Cammack's team in the new year. Hofmann has raised money for some of Florida's most successful Republicans, including Sens. Marco Rubio and Rick Scott, Gov. Ron DeSantis, and Reps. Rutherford, Waltz, and Diaz-Balart.
Andrew Theodore, Campaign PAC Fundraising: Theodore is the owner of the Theodore Company, serving as Cammack's PAC fundraiser during the general election in FL-03 over the last cycle. He will continue in this capacity, assisting Congresswoman-Elect Cammack with her national fundraising efforts.
###
Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) will be the youngest Republican woman serving in the 117th Congress. She is a small business owner with grit, who grew up on a cattle ranch. She is a third-generation sandblaster, an alumnus of the United States Naval War College, and was the former Deputy Chief of Staff for Florida's 3rd Congressional District prior to her election.
Kat is married to her husband Matt, a Gainesville native, who is a Firefighter/Paramedic & SWAT Medic. Together, they co-founded a non-profit organization called "The Grit Foundation," whose mission is to support local law enforcement, veterans, and first responders.
