clean_body: | | | | | | == | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE December 31, 2020 MEDIA CONTACTS Derek Dufresne, derek@rightvoter.com Adeline Sandridge, adeline.sandridge@gmail.com Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) Names Powerhouse Senior Staff & Campaign Team WASHINGTON, D.C. - Today U.S. Representative-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) announced the members of her powerhouse team in the Washington, D.C. and district offices and her Florida campaign operations team. The top-notch legislative team includes Cammack's chief of staff, deputy chief of staff, legislative director, communications director, constituent advocacy director, and veterans and military liaison. The experienced, dynamic campaign team includes general consultants, fundraisers, and PAC experts. "I'm proud of the strong, talented individuals we have brought together to form the FL-03 team. The constituents of Florida's 3rd District deserve the best and I believe we have put together a senior political and policy operation designed to deliver superior service and representation in our Nation's Capitol. We're excited to pursue an aggressive and meaningful legislative agenda during my first term in office and I know this team will be instrumental to our success," said Cammack of her Capitol Hill and district team. "I also look forward to working alongside the powerful political team led by Derek, Kevin, and Andrew as they continue to build an unparalleled fundraising and networking operation for the campaign." Official Federal Staff Biographies: Larry Calhoun, Chief of Staff: Calhoun joins Congresswoman-Elect Cammack's team as chief of staff with over 12 years of Capitol Hill experience. Most recently, he served as chief of staff to Rep. Ted Yoho prior to his retirement. Calhoun is a graduate of the University of Florida and was born and raised in the Sunshine State. Jessica Norfleet, Deputy Chief of Staff: Norfleet joins Cammack's team after eight years of service as district director on Rep. Ted Yoho's staff. She is a licensed general contractor and longtime business owner with extensive working knowledge of the industries in FL-03. Norfleet is a wife and mother to two children and a vocal advocate for small business and agriculture. Joshua Woodward, Legislative Director: Woodward will continue his service to Florida's 3rd District as Cammack's legislative director. Born in North Carolina and a graduate of the University of North Carolina Chapel Hill, he started his congressional service with former RSC chair Mark Walker and worked on agriculture and trade issues for Rep. Yoho until his retirement. Adeline Sandridge, Communications Director: Sandridge joins Cammack's team after working at D.C. public affairs firm Hamilton Place Strategies. In this new role, she will oversee all communications efforts for Congresswoman-Elect Cammack's office, including digital and social media, press, and more. Sandridge is a proud graduate of the University of Virginia's Frank Batten School of Leadership and Public Policy. Dorothy Richardson, Constituent Advocacy Director: Richardson joins Cammack's team with eight years of service to the constituents of FL-03, overseeing constituent relations, casework, and advocacy. She is a proud graduate of the University of Florida, devoted wife of 23 years to husband Brian, and mother to three children. Dave Hill, Veterans and Military Liaison: Hill serves as the Veterans and Military Liaison on Cammack's team, introducing his 26 years of experience in the Air Force and 22 years at Florida's Department of Veteran Affairs to serve veterans across the district. Hill works to navigate the cumbersome benefits system to deliver results for Florida's heroes. Campaign Staff Biographies Derek Dufresne & RightVoter Team, General Campaign Consultants: Dufresne is a partner and co-founder at D.C.-based firm RightVoter, where he and his team served as then-candidate Cammack's general consultants during the 10-way Republican primary and general election in FL-03. Dufresne and his team will continue their work on the campaign side, advising Representative-Elect Cammack in all campaign-related political, fundraising, and communications activities. Kevin Hofmann, Florida Fundraising: Hofmann is the owner of the Archmann Group and will join Cammack's team in the new year. Hofmann has raised money for some of Florida's most successful Republicans, including Sens. Marco Rubio and Rick Scott, Gov. Ron DeSantis, and Reps. Rutherford, Waltz, and Diaz-Balart. Andrew Theodore, Campaign PAC Fundraising: Theodore is the owner of the Theodore Company, serving as Cammack's PAC fundraiser during the general election in FL-03 over the last cycle. He will continue in this capacity, assisting Congresswoman-Elect Cammack with her national fundraising efforts. Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) will be the youngest Republican woman serving in the 117th Congress. She is a small business owner with grit, who grew up on a cattle ranch. She is a third-generation sandblaster, an alumnus of the United States Naval War College, and was the former Deputy Chief of Staff for Florida's 3rd Congressional District prior to her election. Kat is married to her husband Matt, a Gainesville native, who is a Firefighter/Paramedic & SWAT Medic. Together, they co-founded a non-profit organization called "The Grit Foundation," whose mission is to support local law enforcement, veterans, and first responders. | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: What a year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

It’s
finally here, the last day of 2020.

Before the year ends, we wanted to share our thanks for being with us
every step up the way. We wouldn’t have been able to do all that we did
without your help and cannot express our gratitude enough.

Here our some of our favorite highlights from the past year:

💪 Nearly 55,000 grassroots supporters from around the country stepped up
to chip in whatever they could to support our organizing work! We’re
incredibly proud to have such a diverse supporter base, and to see our
Texas work supported by so many folks with unique lived experiences and
backgrounds.

📞 We made over 76 million contact attempts to Texas voters, broken down
into 57.8 million texts and 18.3 million calls made by amazing volunteers
from around the world! On top of that, PxP volunteers made over one
million voter contact calls in Georgia for the runoffs.

🗳️ We helped register nearly 200,000 likely-Democrat Texas voters, and
then saw record voter turnout!

🍎 During the beginning of the pandemic, we filled over 17,000 food bank
shift hours across Texas before the CARES Act was passed by Congress.
Plus, we raised over $240,000 for food banks around Texas and the country.

💙 And we did this all with the help of more than 20,000 volunteers who
stepped up to call, text or knock on the doors of Texas voters for one of
the biggest elections in our lifetime.

👀 As for what’s to come in the future, our team is currently cooking up
big things for 2021 (and beyond).

As you can see, we accomplished a lot of amazing things together this year
and we can’t wait for what’s next!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44076?refcode=ema20201231-118411&t=1001&akid=118411%2E444211%2Et_bbOP ]If you want to help us start off the new year really strong, chip in
whatever you can afford to support our people-powered organizing work. Our
average donation for this month is $16.81.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44076?refcode=ema20201231-118411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=118411%2E444211%2Et_bbOP ]Contribute $3

No matter how involved (or not – we understand, it was a hard year!) you
were with Powered by People this year, let us say thank you, once again.
You are the reason we were able to accomplish so much.

With thanks,

The Powered by People team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=118411%2E444211%2Et_bbOP

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Ring in the New Year with a New Senate
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Friends,
In a year that felt like our own custom-made stress tests, I was moved and inspired by your continued generosity and support for our neighbors and our nation.
This year, your support enabled us to raise over $100,000 for democratic candidates and win the Presidency! Your generosity also enabled us to raise $100,000 to launch a program to support hundreds of struggling minority-owned farms and feed tens of thousands of hungry families with beautiful fresh produce.
I’m reaching out because we need to come together once again. The Georgia Senate races are tied, the control of the Senate hangs in the balance, and they need our help reaching voters.
You can help in two ways:
1\. This year, your support enabled us to raise over $100,000 for democratic candidates and win the Presidency! body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2020
PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN NORTH METRO AREA
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler was in the north metro area for three campaign stops to encourage early voting. She kicked off the morning with a fired-up crowd in Marietta before heading to Norcross and then Gainesville, where she was joined by Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) for a New Year's Eve Early Vote Concert starring Riley Green. All of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of supporters who are ready to hold the line and keep Georgia red on January 5th. Find your polling location [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tW5vyZQOwaUAcHHXNt4JyGn5xOYXNwNnCdfs7J0QNDd7CT93XaF2M9fF1XNLZSknPcaD2Nnep1uZYeLGX6BNKp4SX6a_oeciieRNAH3NdggWtjUnJT1ZlG0xRPiehSbYcKQPsVRlTAiH4pPzpYiXzdoZ2Zf8bN1fJxoCcX-Zn7w=&c=iyQahjqjTREC7c97tBtZpGZMHf5wQcoBKPjsZpLHm3J8GWnYDHKGAQ==&ch=200qX_AMM2avuqd4XXvi8pP_7q3WOYIDBnqdhmsCxYebuCwfOjlDxw==), make a plan to vote, and remind your friends, family members, neighbors, and co-workers to get out to vote too.

name: Electoral College Alert
subject: Sign the petition: New York should count
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (<a href="http://demandprogress
body: Dear Peter, Joe Biden won the November election by more than four percent and seven million votes - but because of the way the Electoral College currently works, a swing of just 25,000 or so votes in handful of states would have handed the election to Donald Trump. State legislatures are about to meet - and we need them to prioritize fixing our democracy. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33657?t=1001&akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd ]Click here to tell your state legislators to support the National Popular Vote bill to make sure the person with the most votes is elected president. In a democracy, it should be common sense that the candidate who wins the most votes becomes the president. Yet, two of the past four presidents were elected to the nation’s highest office after losing the popular vote. There’s no sugarcoating it: This is a blatantly anti-democratic system of choosing the president. That's because the way the United States elects presidents, through the electoral college, wasn't designed to be democratic. But states themselves are complicit in this anti-democratic system: They choose how to allocate their own electoral college votes, regardless of who won the popular vote across America. You can change that, by telling your state legislators to ensure that states agree to allocate their electoral college votes to the presidential candidate who wins the national popular vote. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33657?t=1002&akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd ]Tell your legislators: Support the National Popular Vote bill! The way the states allocate their electoral college votes right now isn’t just anti-democratic. It also means that presidential candidates only have to focus their energy on winning voter support in the few swing states where electoral college votes are up for grabs. When Trump won the presidency, despite losing the popular vote, he carried Michigan by a bare 11,000 votes, Wisconsin by 23,000, and Pennsylvania by 44,000. In other words, 78,000 votes in three states cancelled out the nearly 3 million votes that Trump lost by in the popular vote. This very nearly happened again last month - in an even more extreme way. If just 25,000 or so votes had been switched in Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin then Trump would have won the electoral college. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33657?t=1003&akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd ]Tell your legislators: Support the National Popular Vote bill! Two-thirds of states had barely any presidential campaign events during the general election cycle, because winning votes in non-battleground states isn’t a rational strategy under this system. There's also another, more serious consequence of this messy system: we run the risk of having another situation like the 2000 election, where the U.S. Supreme Court decided to stop counting ballots in Florida and hand the election to George W. Bush. The U.S. Supreme Court should never be asked to decide a presidential election again. So how can we restore our democracy? Fifteen states and Washington D.C. have already signed onto the National Popular Vote compact to agree to allocate their electoral college votes to the presidential candidate who wins the popular vote. We just need a few more states to sign on, so that a majority of the electoral college votes are committed to the president who wins the popular vote. Can you tell your representative to support the compact, and ensure that in all future presidential elections, every vote in every state matters? State legislatures are about to meet - and we need them to prioritize fixing our democracy. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33657?t=1004&akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd ]Tell your legislators: Support the National Popular Vote bill! Thanks for taking action, The Team at Demand Progress [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33204?t=1005&akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd ]DONATE ---------- PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (DemandProgress.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Join our online community on Facebook or Twitter. You can unsubscribe from this list at any time: http://act.demandprogress.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27416%2E8104458%2EtkvKkd
clean_body: Dear Peter, Joe Biden won the November election by more than four percent and seven million votes - but because of the way the Electoral College currently works, a swing of just 25,000 or so votes in handful of states would have handed the election to Donald Trump. State legislatures are about to meet - and we need them to prioritize fixing our democracy. [ ]Click here to tell your state legislators to support the National Popular Vote bill to make sure the person with the most votes is elected president. In a democracy, it should be common sense that the candidate who wins the most votes becomes the president. Yet, two of the past four presidents were elected to the nation’s highest office after losing the popular vote. There’s no sugarcoating it: This is a blatantly anti-democratic system of choosing the president. That's because the way the United States elects presidents, through the electoral college, wasn't designed to be democratic. But states themselves are complicit in this anti-democratic system: They choose how to allocate their own electoral college votes, regardless of who won the popular vote across America. You can change that, by telling your state legislators to ensure that states agree to allocate their electoral college votes to the presidential candidate who wins the national popular vote. [ ]Tell your legislators: Support the National Popular Vote bill! The way the states allocate their electoral college votes right now isn’t just anti-democratic. It also means that presidential candidates only have to focus their energy on winning voter support in the few swing states where electoral college votes are up for grabs. When Trump won the presidency, despite losing the popular vote, he carried Michigan by a bare 11,000 votes, Wisconsin by 23,000, and Pennsylvania by 44,000. In other words, 78,000 votes in three states cancelled out the nearly 3 million votes that Trump lost by in the popular vote. This very nearly happened again last month - in an even more extreme way. If just 25,000 or so votes had been switched in Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin then Trump would have won the electoral college. [ ]Tell your legislators: Support the National Popular Vote bill! During the challenge, you’ll learn how to build your network of donors, use social media effectively, and even identify key organizations to connect with who can support your campaign.

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Shill for China & Marxist Wife Beater
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting the radical Left like our freedoms depend on it- because they do! Right now, I need you to join me in that fight

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA
!

I have one word to describe the two radical Democrats running for U.S. Senate in Georgia: Disgusting.

The Democrats are offering Georgia a slap in the face. They despise your traditional values. They loathe our all-American patriotism. Warnock even praised the vile Rev. Wright who "damned America"! Ossoff cannot say the name of our country without a contemptuous sneer. These two LOSERS are unworthy of Georgia, my friends.

They are funded from out-of-state limousine liberals like Soros and Bloomberg.

And now we see that Ossoff is taking Chinese Communist money:

The Perdue campaign connected the dots in a digital ad with news clips of critics, including Sen. Marsha Blackburn, Tennessee Republican, raising concerns about Mr. Ossoff’s company receiving payments from PCCW Media, which is owned in part by China Unicom, a state-run telecommunications provider.

The ad, “Jon Ossoff Has a China Problem,” ends with a photo of Mr. Swalwell posing with Christine Fang, the suspected Chinese operative who’s also known as Fang Fang.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

But as bad as being a pawn for the Communist Chinese is, it's even worse, what Warnock has done:

The incident was first reported by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution as Warnock was gearing up to compete against GOP Sen. Kelly Loeffler in what has become a high-stakes runoff that will determine which party controls the U.S. Senate.

In the footage, an officer can be seen pulling up to Warnock’s house in Atlanta. Warnock tells the officer his estranged wife called the police on him and alleged that he had run over her foot with his car, which Warnock denied.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

One, bought by the Chinese.

The other, a Marxist and a wife-beater.

These clowns are funded by the lowest of the low, people who hate our freedom and want to sell our country out.

They share the agenda of AOC:

-Unlimited amnesty for illegals

-Defunding the police.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-"Repenting for whiteness" (Warnock's words, not mine).

-AOC's Green New Deal.

IF THIS ISN'T WHAT YOU WANT, HELP US!

These traitors and scumbags need to be beaten. Let's beat them!.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. We don't surrender to Communists, we don't coddle them, we don't work with them- we defeat them, and we do it often!

We are America First patriots who are taking the fight to the Socialists and their anti-American allies. Help us make sure the Good Guys have control of the Senate!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Time is running out. January's election is almost upon us! We are making a real difference here - but with your help!

We want pro-gun, pro-life, pro-Trump Senators to win, but we MUST win two of two races there. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA
- Georgia is not Socialist, and we don't need the anti-American politicans either!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. They need us! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Christopher Ekstrom

Businessman

America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j2xLuhvgbrcqI4c&b=5BGpgOv6X_xC6l2l6JECOA
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SVnnZ0MqkcR96jVyLfAkN3dP_tARo2KqrQSF2RL_KFw=/pOn1llACfu4VyvbROZ9So32ZefS6QHlUVdkQEs9cd4g=?refcode=EOY7)
| | Friend, 2020 is finally over. It didn't really feel like it would ever end, did it? This year has been filled with challenges, loss, and some successes. It would be a mistake to look back on this year without first acknowledging the pain so many members of our state and country have experienced. Over 330,000 Americans have now died from the COVID-19 pandemic that President Trump and Republicans in Congress have failed to take seriously. The murder of George Floyd and the grief of people all across the world sparked a national conversation based right here in Minnesota. George Floyd should be alive today. The economic effect of the pandemic on Minnesotans is a crisis we have yet to know the complete scope of, but it needs to be one of our top priorities going forward. While this year was in many ways a dumpster fire, it wasn't a complete disaster. Together, we took back the White House, elected the first woman of color to the Executive Branch, and protected our majority in the Minnesota House of Representatives. The road ahead for our country and our state is not easy nor clear at the moment. But we have to come together and get things done. The COVID-19 vaccine is being distributed and the sun is rising. In the meantime, we need to take care of ourselves and our loved ones. Please continue to wear a mask and social distance. I know it's hard during the holiday season, but it's all we've got. I look forward to getting back to work on behalf of the people of Minnesota when the new Legislature is sworn in next week. Together, I know we can build a better future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---
DFL House Caucus
255 E Plato Blvd
Saint Paul MN 55107 United States
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SVnnZ0MqkcR96jVyLfAkN3dP_tARo2KqrQSF2RL_KFw=/8MAfqHQBlHx3FdiD_yrcDqAtYViNdhvmeG3QlxlO-qg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SVnnZ0MqkcR96jVyLfAkN3dP_tARo2KqrQSF2RL_KFw=/eYBCfONSQX7ybOnybdo5COVm5vYGHWOOz2CY87QqkzE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SVnnZ0MqkcR96jVyLfAkN3dP_tARo2KqrQSF2RL_KFw=/C8Xf_0qT48McWioeXG9ZoCCcxkFju3K_Ybpf6sSV_sU=)

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Year End Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Dear Friends,

As 2020, comes to a close I want to express my deepest gratitude for your
incredible support. That support allowed me the great honor of being the
Republican nominee for Arizona’s First Congressional District. It is the
privilege of a lifetime to be able to fight for the values that made America
and Arizona great and to give a voice to the hardworking decent people of our
district.

Campaigning during COVID was quite a challenge. It was heartbreaking to lose
some of our dear ones to illness, watch our strong economy begin to crumble and
see so much harm done to our small business community and Arizonans who work so
hard to put food on the table. Because of these hardships, I was more
determined than ever to overcome obstacles, encourage those around me, and do
whatever I could to serve my country and community. It is a blessing to fight
for the greatest country on earth.

All dark clouds have silver linings. Even with the challenges in 2020, there
were many bright highlights:

* Receiving President Trump’s endorsement. He has done so much to help my
family prosper and live in a safer world. I am proud to work with him to Keep
America Great.
* Receiving more votes than any Republican nominee in Arizona 01.
* Working with the leadership of the Navajo and White Mountain Apache Tribes
and building lasting relationships; using my platform to bring attention to
issues that have plagued the First Nations for far too long; and being honored
with the endorsement of Vice President Lizer of the Navajo Nation.
* Meeting and becoming friends with so many patriots who love our country,
volunteer in our communities, and gave it their all at a critical but difficult
time.
Unfortunately, we fell short in taking back the House of Representatives. As a
Mom and a small business owner, I am worried that liberal, socialist, and
anti-American policies will destroy what we have worked for and rob our
children of their future. I am more committed than ever to not let that happen
to my family or to yours.

We must remember what one of my heroes, Winston Churchill said, Success is not
final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.

Continuing on,

Tiffany Shedd

Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

| | \-- I’ll be honest, we weren’t sure whether we could reach Steve’s $25,000 goal before the six-month-long fundraising blackout begins January 2nd. But after we reached out again, you all **STEPPED UP!** Right now, we’re just $10,348 short with the blackout deadline fast-approaching. name: Mary Mancini
subject: Happy New Year!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
In a few hours we will all get a fresh start. This year has not been the easiest for Tennessee, but as always we made it through. To all of you who’ve already supported Tennessee Democrats this year, we can’t thank you enough. It is because of you that the TNDP was able to accomplish so much – from voter registration to digital, you all had our backs!
As we close the door on 2020, I want to make one last request. We are just shy of reaching our $20,000 goal, and it would mean the world if we can make it by midnight. If you haven’t already, and can afford to, please consider making a donation in any amount. It all helps! Our 100% match offer expires at midnight. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

I would like to take this time to wish you all a Happy New Year and give an update on our race.
---
| [Donate Now](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=d844e51f9f&e=16fac31a0f "Donate Now")
---
| | | We are ready to bring the fight to keep this seat into 2021. On November 3rd, we were elected by Iowa voters, and this year, we will show Rita Hart and Nancy Pelosi that Iowans are the final arbiters of their own elections.

This fight isn't just about one seat. This is a fight to uphold the integrity of Iowa's elections and to ensure Iowans get to pick their representative, not D.C. politicians.

If you want to help, the best ways to help are:
1.) [Chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help with our legal fees.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=295d202b3e&e=16fac31a0f)
2.) [Sign-up to submit a letter to the editor.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=d09a1dde7b&e=16fac31a0f)
3.) Make your voice heard by sharing this email with family and friends, or even posting about this race on social media.

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
Congresswoman-Elect
---
| [ ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=15f9f74df3&e=16fac31a0f)

I also mentioned that the results of the runoff race in Georgia will chart the course of the country. These races are not just about the voters in Georgia, but about all of us. Every single dollar counts more than ever right now to help protect and defend our American values in Georgia. The Far-Left is chomping at the bit to flip Georgia... The worst part is? Peter, I sent you an email just the other day that detailed the options that Georgians are faced with in these two Senate races: Conservatism or Radicalism. If they were to win, they would take control of the Senate majority. Peter, the Far-Left will fundamentally transform this country if they take over they have said they want to: Pack the Supreme Court Increase regulations. Raise taxes. And so much more. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy New Year!
body: [INSIDE JW] HAPPY NEW YEAR! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=21632&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS94UDNHcDJscVpLUT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIzMTIyNTE0NA==] We enter the new year with the presidential election still undecided and with a good deal of uncertainty about the next few days. Be of good cheer nevertheless! We have a good example to follow. On New Year’s Eve a year ago, President Trump was facing impeachment, and yet he was cheerful [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=21633&F=T&] as he celebrated with friends and family. Here’s what he said [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=21634&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvYnJpZWZpbmdzLXN0YXRlbWVudHMvcmVtYXJrcy1wcmVzaWRlbnQtdHJ1bXAtbmV3LXllYXJzLWV2ZS1jZWxlYnJhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMzEyMjUxNDQ=] then: “Happy New Year. We’re going to have a great year, I predict. I think it’s going to be a fantastic year.” On that day there was trouble in Iraq, Iran and North Korea – when is that not true? – and still the president was upbeat. He also noted, quite presciently, given what’s happening in Washington right now: “I do say two things: We have to check corruption, and we also have to find out why is it that the United States is always giving foreign countries money.” I am hopeful about this New Year. Despite the howling of the media that the election is over, I know it isn’t. I explained in an article [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=21635&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy8yMDIwLzEyLzIzL2ZpdHRvbi1ob3BlLWZvci1hLWZhaWxlZC1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMzEyMjUxNDQ=] in _Breitbart_: The Electoral College vote can be challenged under federal law and the United States Constitution. Republican electors in seven contested states cast alternate votes for Donald Trump to keep their legal options open. State legislatures retain their constitutional authority to offer alternative slates of electors. And Congress is the ultimate arbiter of the race since the ballot count can be contested during the joint session on January 6. Something President Eisenhower once said reminds me of our current president: “Neither a wise man nor a brave man lies down on the tracks of history to wait for the train of the future to run over him.” I suggest you contact your senators and congressmen to let them know what you think about this historic constitutional battle over the Electoral College. The Capitol Hill switchboard number is 202-225-3121. At Judicial Watch we are firmly resolved that in this New Year we will continue to expose the two biggest scandals in U.S. history: the coup attempt by the Deep State to overthrow our president, and the massively fraudulent election that resulted when the coup failed. And we will continue to uncover the details of the Biden scandals that the media and Justice Department can’t be trusted to pursue. I hope you’ll make a special New Year’s contribution in support of our essential work ahead. We are resolutely optimistic. And we wish for you and your family good health and prosperity in 2021. Happy New Year and God Bless America! [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjMxMjI1MTQ0] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjMxMjI1MTQ0] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjMxMjI1MTQ0] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjMxMjI1MTQ0] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIzMTIyNTE0NA==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2020, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52500&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjMxMjI1MTQ0] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=52500&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=52500&AGENCY=jw&]

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: Just Hours Left
body:
| | Peter, Just hours remain in 2020, a history-making year to say the least. A generous donor of My Faith Votes has just stepped forward with an _additional_ matching grant, challenging us to a year-end stretch goal of $300,000. **That means any year-end gift towards this goal will be doubled.** [**So, before the year ends, I urge you to make one final 2020 tax-deductible donation. We need to raise a total of $300,000 by 11:59 p.m. tonight, or we lose the opportunity of the matching grant.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndpm&n=1) [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndpm&n=2) [**Time is running out to DOUBLE THE IMPACT with your gift and have it go twice as far in the fight for biblical values in 2021, starting in Georgia – the swing state for this new administration’s liberal agenda.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndpm&n=3) It will also help us at My Faith Votes prepare for the inevitable fights that are already beginning to rear their head. Look no further than the choice of radical, pro-abortion culture warriors like California’s Attorney General Xavier Becerra to serve in a Biden cabinet (if sworn in) – a man who will work tirelessly to undo all of the pro-life progress of the last four years. In 2021, those of us who care about biblical values will need to be extremely engaged, informed, and vigilant. My Faith Votes’ mission does not end with one election. In many ways, what we do next will be even more important. It has been an honor fighting alongside you this year, and I am rolling up my sleeves in preparations for the impending 2021 battles. Thank you, and please stand with My Faith Votes through your support today. We are a 100% donor-funded non-profit, and we are grateful for your generosity. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndpm&n=4) Steadfast and loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201231apl01ndpm&n=5)
